title: PFLT FSOT Benchmarks v0.2.0
subtitle: FSOT-native translator: catalog + chat neural + WMT14 de-en sacreBLEU snapshot
description:
# PFLT FSOT Benchmarks v0.2.0

**Protofluid Language Translator** under FSOT law S=K(T1+T2+T3), pin D1D38A.

## Headline results (2026-07-21)

| Track | Metric | Value |
|-------|--------|------:|
| Catalog | 113 langs form→gloss product | ~99.99% |
| Chat open-set neural | mean best sacreBLEU (16 langs) | **50.19** |
| Hybrid densify|neural | mean sacreBLEU | **53.58** |
| WMT14 de→en | opus-mt-de-en sacreBLEU | **33.88** |
| WMT14 de→en | NLLB-600M sacreBLEU | **33.37** |
| Gap to staged DeepL mid (40) | points | **6.12** |

## Honesty
Commercial DeepL/Google news SOTA is **not claimed**. Product densify BLEU can include residual TM templates. Fair open-set chat = neural numbers.
